company.description: As your technology partner, Three30 Group has the expertise to analyze and solve major issues with your technology integration, and create a wide array of custom software solutions that help bridge the gaps in your company’s business technology processes. Zoho One: Three30 Group’s in-house Zoho experts possess deep knowledge of the entire Zoho product line including its flagship all-inclusive suite, Zoho One, that enables users to integrate sales, marketing, e-commerce, event management, forms and surveys, live chat functionality, customer support, email hosting, project management, accounting and more. Zoho CRM: We make learning and implementing Zoho CRM a breeze. Three30 Group helps your team build the sales funnel and automations they need to successfully engage with clients, track progress, and close sales. Whether you’re targeting B2B or B2C, our training modules prepare your team to fully maximize Zoho CRM’s multifaceted capabilities. Custom Software Development & Integration: Three30 Group has over 20 years of expertise creating custom applications and software integrations including web portals and reporting that help fill operational gaps and maximize your existing investment in technology. From PHP and .NET, MySQL and SQL Server, to Zoho Analytics, QuickBooks and SAP, Three30 Group connects your processes with third party apps to create the custom solutions your company needs. Dashboard & BI: Our team of application developers and data visualization experts organize your data into meaningful reports and dashboards so you’re able to manage and track key business metrics and trends that impact your operation across product offerings and departments. Using Microsoft Power BI, Zoho Analytics, and Wyn Enterprise, Three30 Group delivers the tools and training to empower your team and inform decisions through comprehensive analysis.
